data.name: Backend_AssetServices_UserSchema_AssetServices_DisplayName
data.value: Asset Repository Services UI

data.name: Backend_AssetServices_UserSchema_Swagger_DisplayName
data.value: Asset Repository Service Swagger UI

data.name: Backend_AssetServices_Api_FullAccess
data.value: Full access to system API

data.name: Backend_AssetServices_Api_ReadOnlyAccess
data.value: Readonly access to system API

data.name: Graphql_Type_IsFinal_Description
data.value: Indicates if the type is final.

data.name: Graphql_Type_Description_Description
data.value: Optional description of the type.

data.name: Graphql_Type_IsAbstract_Description
data.value: Indicates if the type is abstract.

data.name: Graphql_Type_CkTypeId_Description
data.value: Construction kit type id, the unique identifier of the type.

data.name: Graphql_Type_Description
data.value: Definition of a construction kit type with name, associations and attributes.

data.name: Graphql_Type_Filter_Attributes_Description
data.value: Allows to filter for specific attribute names within construction kit types.

data.name: Graphql_Type_DerivedTypes_Description
data.value: Lists types that are derived from the current construction kit type.

data.name: Graphql_Type_BaseType_Description
data.value: The base type the current type is derived from.

data.name: Graphql_Record_Description
data.value: Definition of a construction kit record with name and attributes.

data.name: Graphql_Record_Description_Description
data.value: Optional description of the record.

data.name: Graphql_Record_IsAbstract_Description
data.value: Indicates if the record is abstract.

data.name: Graphql_Record_IsFinal_Description
data.value: Indicates if the record is final.

data.name: Graphql_Record_CkRecordId_Description
data.value: Construction kit record id, the unique identifier of the record.

data.name: Graphql_Record_DerivedRecords_Description
data.value: Lists types that are derived from the current construction kit record.

data.name: Graphql_Record_Filter_Attributes_Description
data.value: Allows to filter for specific attribute names within construction kit records.

data.name: Graphql_Record_BaseRecord_Description
data.value: The base record the current record is derived from.

data.name: Graphql_Enum_Description
data.value: Definition of a construction kit record with name and attributes.

data.name: Graphql_Enum_Description_Description
data.value: Optional description of the record.

data.name: Graphql_Enum_UseFlags_Description
data.value: Whether the enum is a flags enum

data.name: Graphql_Enum_Values_Description
data.value: Values of the enum.

data.name: Graphql_Enum_CkEnumId_Description
data.value: Construction kit enum id, the unique identifier of the enum.

data.name: Graphql_Model_Description_Description
data.value: Optional description of the model.

data.name: Graphql_Enum_IsExtensible_Description
data.value: Whether the enum is extensible for customization.

data.name: Graphql_EnumValue_Description
data.value: A construction kit enum value

data.name: Graphql_EnumValue_Key_Description
data.value: Unique key of enum value

data.name: Graphql_EnumValue_Description_Description
data.value: Description of enum value

data.name: Graphql_EnumValue_Name_Description
data.value: Name of enum value

data.name: Graphql_EnumValue_IsExtension_Description
data.value: True, when the enum value is a custom extension, otherwise false

data.name: Graphql_Enum_CkExtensionUpdateOperations_Description
data.value: Defines the possible operation operations to extend construction elements.

data.name: Graphql_CkMutation_CkId_Description
data.value: CkEnumId to filter for

data.name: Graphql_CkMutation_CkIds_Description
data.value: CkEnumIds to filter for

data.name: Graphql_CkMutation_Description
data.value: Construction Kit element mutations

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryRow_Description
data.value: Represents a row within a runtime query execution

data.name: Graphql_Arguments_AttributePathsFilter_Description
data.value: List of attribute paths to filter for.

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryCell_Description
data.value: Represents a cell of a row within a runtime query execution.

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryCell_AttribuePath_Description
data.value: Path of the attribute within an entity.

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryCell_Value_Description
data.value: Value of the cell.

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryCellInput_Description
data.value: Represents the input for a cell a row within a runtime query.

data.name: Graphql_RtQueryRowUpdate_Item_Description
data.value: Row as input to be updated within the query.

data.name: Graphql_RtQuery_Description
data.value: Represents a runtime query exection.
